<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="id" class="scroll-smooth">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>PIJAT URUT TRADISIONAL (Akupresur, Acupoint, Anatomi)</title>
    
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <script src="https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest"></script>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    
    <style>
        body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; }
        .modal-active { overflow: hidden; }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="min-h-screen bg-slate-50 text-slate-800">

    <!-- MODAL DETAIL ORGAN (Hidden by default) -->
    <div id="organModal" class="fixed inset-0 z-[100] hidden flex items-center justify-center p-4 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm">
        <div class="bg-white rounded-3xl max-w-md w-full overflow-hidden shadow-2xl transform transition-all">
            <div id="modalHeader" class="bg-teal-600 p-6 text-white flex justify-between items-center">
                <h3 id="modalTitle" class="text-2xl font-bold">Detail Organ</h3>
                <button onclick="closeModal()" class="hover:bg-teal-500 p-1 rounded-full transition-colors">
                    <i data-lucide="x" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                </button>
            </div>
            <div class="p-8">
                <div id="modalContent" class="text-slate-600 leading-relaxed space-y-4 text-lg">
                    <!-- Konten dinamis -->
                </div>
                <button onclick="closeModal()" class="mt-8 w-full bg-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-200 text-slate-800 font-bold py-3 rounded-xl transition-colors">
                    Tutup
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <nav class="fixed w-full bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md shadow-sm z-50">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
            <div class="flex justify-between items-center h-20">
                <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <div class="bg-teal-600 p-2 rounded-lg">
                        <i data-lucide="leaf" class="w-6 h-6 text-white"></i>
                    </div>
                    <span class="font-bold text-xl text-teal-900 tracking-tight">PIJAT TRADISIONAL</span>
                </div>

                <div class="hidden md:flex space-x-8 items-center">
                    <a href="#beranda" class="text-slate-600 hover:text-teal-600 font-medium transition-colors">Beranda</a>
                    <a href="#tentang" class="text-slate-600 hover:text-teal-600 font-medium transition-colors">Tentang Kami</a>
                    <a href="#layanan" class="text-slate-600 hover:text-teal-600 font-medium transition-colors">Layanan</a>
                    <a href="#kontak" class="text-slate-600 hover:text-teal-600 font-medium transition-colors">Kontak</a>
                    <a href="#reservasi" class="bg-teal-600 text-white px-5 py-2.5 rounded-full font-medium hover:bg-teal-700 transition-colors shadow-md hover:shadow-lg">
                        Reservasi
                    </a>
                </div>

                <div class="md:hidden flex items-center">
                    <button id="menu-btn" class="text-slate-600 hover:text-teal-600 focus:outline-none">
                        <i data-lucide="menu" id="icon-menu" class="w-7 h-7"></i>
                        <i data-lucide="x" id="icon-close" class="w-7 h-7 hidden"></i>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div id="mobile-menu" class="hidden md:hidden bg-white border-t border-slate-100 absolute w-full shadow-lg">
            <div class="px-4 pt-2 pb-4 space-y-1">
                <a href="#beranda" class="mobile-link block px-3 py-3 text-base font-medium text-slate-700 hover:text-teal-600 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md">Beranda</a>
                <a href="#tentang" class="mobile-link block px-3 py-3 text-base font-medium text-slate-700 hover:text-teal-600 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md">Tentang Kami</a>
                <a href="#layanan" class="mobile-link block px-3 py-3 text-base font-medium text-slate-700 hover:text-teal-600 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md">Layanan</a>
                <a href="#kontak" class="mobile-link block px-3 py-3 text-base font-medium text-slate-700 hover:text-teal-600 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md">Kontak</a>
                <div class="pt-2">
                    <a href="#reservasi" class="mobile-link block w-full text-center bg-teal-600 text-white px-5 py-3 rounded-md font-medium hover:bg-teal-700 transition-colors">
                        Buat Janji Temu
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </nav>

    <section id="beranda" class="pt-28 pb-16 md:pt-36 md:pb-24 lg:pt-40 lg:pb-32 bg-teal-50 relative overflow-hidden">
        <div class="absolute top-0 right-0 -mr-20 -mt-20 w-96 h-96 rounded-full bg-teal-100 opacity-50 blur-3xl"></div>
        <div class="absolute bottom-0 left-0 -ml-20 -mb-20 w-80 h-80 rounded-full bg-blue-100 opacity-50 blur-3xl"></div>
        
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 relative z-10">
            <div class="grid lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center">
                <div class="space-y-8">
                    <div class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full bg-teal-100 text-teal-800 text-sm font-semibold mb-2">
                        <i data-lucide="activity" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                        <span>Pengobatan Tradisional Bersertifikat</span>
                    </div>
                    <h1 class="text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-extrabold text-slate-900 leading-tight">
                        Kembalikan <span class="text-teal-600">Keseimbangan</span> Tubuh & Energi Anda
                    </h1>
                    <p class="text-lg text-slate-600 leading-relaxed md:pr-10">
                        Klinik Sehat Alami menyediakan terapi Pijat, Bekam dan Akupuntur profesional untuk mengatasi berbagai keluhan kesehatan, membuang racun, dan meredakan nyeri secara alami.
                    </p>
                    <div class="flex flex-col sm:row gap-4">
                        <a href="https://wa.me/6285147999900?text=Halo%20Admin%2C%20saya%20ingin%20konsultasi." 
                            target="_blank" 
                            class="inline-flex justify-center items-center gap-2 bg-teal-600 text-white px-8 py-3.5 rounded-full font-bold text-lg hover:bg-teal-700 transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-teal-600/30">
                            Konsultasi Gratis <i data-lucide="chevron-right" class="w-5 h-5"></i>
                        </a>
                        <a href="#layanan" class="inline-flex justify-center items-center gap-2 bg-white text-teal-700 border-2 border-teal-100 px-8 py-3.5 rounded-full font-bold text-lg hover:bg-teal-50 transition-all">
                            Pelajari Layanan
                        </a>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="relative rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-2xl lg:ml-8 group">
                    <img 
                        src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Foto (2) (1).png"/></body></html> 
                    <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 to-transparent"></div>
                    <div class="absolute bottom-6 left-6 right-6">
                        <div class="bg-white/95 backdrop-blur rounded-xl p-4 shadow-lg flex items-center gap-4">
                            <div class="bg-teal-100 p-3 rounded-full text-teal-600">
                                <i data-lucide="heart-pulse" class="w-8 h-8"></i>
                            </div>
                            <div>
                                <p class="font-bold text-slate-900">1000+ Pasien Terbantu</p>
                                <p class="text-sm text-slate-600">Ditangani oleh terapis ahli & berpengalaman.</p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <section id="layanan" class="py-20 bg-white">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
            <div class="text-center max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-16">
                <h2 class="text-teal-600 font-bold tracking-wide uppercase text-sm mb-2">Layanan Kami</h2>
                <h3 class="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-extrabold text-slate-900 mb-4">Terapi Berbasis Sunnah & Medis Timur</h3>
                <p class="text-slate-600 text-lg">
                    Kami menggabungkan kebijaksanaan pengobatan klasik dengan standar kebersihan modern untuk memberikan hasil terapi yang maksimal.
                </p>
            </div>

            <div class="mb-16 rounded-3xl overflow-hidden shadow-lg h-64 md:h-96">
                <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Foto (1) (1).png"/></body></html>
            </div>

            <div class="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-10">
                <div class="bg-slate-50 rounded-3xl p-8 border border-slate-100 hover:shadow-xl transition-shadow duration-300">
                    <div class="w-16 h-16 bg-red-100 text-red-600 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center mb-6 shadow-inner">
                        <i data-lucide="droplet" class="w-8 h-8"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h4 class="text-2xl font-bold text-slate-900 mb-3">Terapi Bekam (Hijamah)</h4>
                    <p class="text-slate-600 mb-6 leading-relaxed">
                        Metode pengeluaran darah statis (toksin) dari permukaan kulit dengan menggunakan sayatan halus dan alat hisap. Sangat efektif untuk detoksifikasi dan meredakan ketegangan otot.
                    </p>
                    <ul class="space-y-3 mb-8">
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-3">
                            <i data-lucide="check-circle" class="w-5 h-5 text-teal-600 shrink-0 mt-0.5"></i>
                            <span class="text-slate-700">Mengeluarkan racun (detoksifikasi)</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-3">
                            <i data-lucide="check-circle" class="w-5 h-5 text-teal-600 shrink-0 mt-0.5"></i>
                            <span class="text-slate-700">Meringankan nyeri bahu, punggung & leher</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-3">
                            <i data-lucide="check-circle" class="w-5 h-5 text-teal-600 shrink-0 mt-0.5"></i>
                            <span class="text-slate-700">Menurunkan tekanan darah tinggi</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-3">
                            <i data-lucide="check-circle" class="w-5 h-5 text-teal-600 shrink-0 mt-0.5"></i>
                            <span class="text-slate-700">Memperbaiki sistem kekebalan tubuh</span>
                        </li>
                    </ul>
                    <a href="#reservasi" class="text-teal-600 font-bold inline-flex items-center gap-1 hover:text-teal-700 transition-colors">
                        Pesan Terapi Bekam <i data-lucide="chevron-right" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                    </a>
                </div>

                <div class="bg-slate-50 rounded-3xl p-8 border border-slate-100 hover:shadow-xl transition-shadow duration-300">
                    <div class="w-16 h-16 bg-blue-100 text-blue-600 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center mb-6 shadow-inner">
                        <i data-lucide="activity" class="w-8 h-8"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h4 class="text-2xl font-bold text-slate-900 mb-3">Terapi Akupuntur</h4>
                    <p class="text-slate-600 mb-6 leading-relaxed">
                        Penusukan jarum steril sekali pakai pada titik-titik meridian tubuh (chi). Bertujuan merangsang sistem saraf, memicu produksi endorfin, dan menyembuhkan berbagai penyakit.
                    </p>
                    <ul class="space-y-3 mb-8">
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-3">
                            <i data-lucide="check-circle" class="w-5 h-5 text-teal-600 shrink-0 mt-0.5"></i>
                            <span class="text-slate-700">Mengatasi migrain dan sakit kepala</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-3">
                            <i data-lucide="check-circle" class="w-5 h-5 text-teal-600 shrink-0 mt-0.5"></i>
                            <span class="text-slate-700">Terapi pemulihan pasca stroke</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-3">
                            <i data-lucide="check-circle" class="w-5 h-5 text-teal-600 shrink-0 mt-0.5"></i>
                            <span class="text-slate-700">Mengurangi stres dan masalah tidur (Insomnia)</span>
                        </li>
                        <li class="flex items-start gap-3">
                            <i data-lucide="check-circle" class="w-5 h-5 text-teal-600 shrink-0 mt-0.5"></i>
                            <span class="text-slate-700">Membantu melancarkan peredaran darah</span>
                        </li>
                    </ul>
                    <a href="#reservasi" class="text-teal-600 font-bold inline-flex items-center gap-1 hover:text-teal-700 transition-colors">
                        Pesan Terapi Akupuntur <i data-lucide="chevron-right" class="w-4 h-4"></i>
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>

    <!-- SECTION LAYANAN PENYAKIT DALAM INTERAKTIF -->
    <section id="layanan-dalam" class="py-20 bg-white">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
            <div class="text-center mb-16">
                <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-slate-900 mb-4">Layanan Pengobatan Penyakit Dalam</h2>
                <p class="text-slate-600 max-w-2xl mx-auto italic">Klik pada kartu organ untuk melihat detail fungsi dan terapi kami.</p>
            </div>

            <div class="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
                <!-- Paru-paru -->
                <div onclick="openOrgan('Paru-paru', 'Terapi difokuskan untuk melancarkan sistem pernapasan, mengatasi asma, bronkiti, serta membantu detoksifikasi bagi perokok.')" class="cursor-pointer bg-teal-50 p-6 rounded-xl border border-teal-100 flex flex-col items-center text-center hover:bg-teal-100 hover:shadow-lg transition-all transform hover:-translate-y-1">
                    <div class="bg-teal-600 p-3 rounded-lg mb-4 text-white">
                        <i data-lucide="wind" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 class="font-bold text-slate-900">Paru-paru</h3>
                </div>

                <!-- Usus Besar -->
                <div onclick="openOrgan('Usus Besar', 'Membantu melancarkan sistem pembuangan, mengatasi sembelit (konstipasi), serta menjaga keseimbangan flora usus melalui titik meridian.')" class="cursor-pointer bg-teal-50 p-6 rounded-xl border border-teal-100 flex flex-col items-center text-center hover:bg-teal-100 hover:shadow-lg transition-all transform hover:-translate-y-1">
                    <div class="bg-teal-600 p-3 rounded-lg mb-4 text-white">
                        <i data-lucide="layers" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 class="font-bold text-slate-900">Usus Besar</h3>
                </div>

                <!-- Selaput Jantung -->
                <div onclick="openOrgan('Selaput Jantung', 'Berperan menjaga kestabilan sirkulasi darah di area dada dan membantu meredakan palpitasi atau detak jantung tidak teratur.')" class="cursor-pointer bg-teal-50 p-6 rounded-xl border border-teal-100 flex flex-col items-center text-center hover:bg-teal-100 hover:shadow-lg transition-all transform hover:-translate-y-1">
                    <div class="bg-teal-600 p-3 rounded-lg mb-4 text-white">
                        <i data-lucide="shield-check" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 class="font-bold text-slate-900">Selaput Jantung</h3>
                </div>

                <!-- Tripemanas -->
                <div onclick="openOrgan('Tripemanas', 'Mengatur keseimbangan cairan tubuh dan metabolisme energi di tiga bagian tubuh (atas, tengah, dan bawah).')" class="cursor-pointer bg-teal-50 p-6 rounded-xl border border-teal-100 flex flex-col items-center text-center hover:bg-teal-100 hover:shadow-lg transition-all transform hover:-translate-y-1">
                    <div class="bg-teal-600 p-3 rounded-lg mb-4 text-white">
                        <i data-lucide="thermometer" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 class="font-bold text-slate-900">Tripemanas</h3>
                </div>

                <!-- Jantung -->
                <div onclick="openOrgan('Jantung', 'Terapi untuk kesehatan mental, ketenangan jiwa, sirkulasi darah pusat, serta mengatasi gangguan tidur atau insomnia.')" class="cursor-pointer bg-teal-50 p-6 rounded-xl border border-teal-100 flex flex-col items-center text-center hover:bg-teal-100 hover:shadow-lg transition-all transform hover:-translate-y-1">
                    <div class="bg-teal-600 p-3 rounded-lg mb-4 text-white">
                        <i data-lucide="heart" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 class="font-bold text-slate-900">Jantung</h3>
                </div>

                <!-- Usus Kecil -->
                <div onclick="openOrgan('Usus Kecil', 'Membantu proses penyerapan nutrisi makanan lebih maksimal dan meredakan nyeri pada pundak serta telinga.')" class="cursor-pointer bg-teal-50 p-6 rounded-xl border border-teal-100 flex flex-col items-center text-center hover:bg-teal-100 hover:shadow-lg transition-all transform hover:-translate-y-1">
                    <div class="bg-teal-600 p-3 rounded-lg mb-4 text-white">
                        <i data-lucide="git-commit" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 class="font-bold text-slate-900">Usus Kecil</h3>
                </div>

                <!-- Limpa -->
                <div onclick="openOrgan('Limpa', 'Meningkatkan daya tahan tubuh (imunitas), sistem limfatik, serta memperbaiki kualitas darah.')" class="cursor-pointer bg-teal-50 p-6 rounded-xl border border-teal-100 flex flex-col items-center text-center hover:bg-teal-100 hover:shadow-lg transition-all transform hover:-translate-y-1">
                    <div class="bg-teal-600 p-3 rounded-lg mb-4 text-white">
                        <i data-lucide="spline" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 class="font-bold text-slate-900">Limpa</h3>
                </div>

                <!-- Liver -->
                <div onclick="openOrgan('Liver / Hati', 'Detoksifikasi racun sisa metabolisme, membantu regenerasi sel darah merah, dan menstabilkan emosi.')" class="cursor-pointer bg-teal-50 p-6 rounded-xl border border-teal-100 flex flex-col items-center text-center hover:bg-teal-100 hover:shadow-lg transition-all transform hover:-translate-y-1">
                    <div class="bg-teal-600 p-3 rounded-lg mb-4 text-white">
                        <i data-lucide="activity" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 class="font-bold text-slate-900">Liver</h3>
                </div>

                <!-- Lambung -->
                <div onclick="openOrgan('Lambung', 'Mengatasi maag, kembung, mual, serta menyeimbangkan asam lambung melalui titik pijat akupresur khusus.')" class="cursor-pointer bg-teal-50 p-6 rounded-xl border border-teal-100 flex flex-col items-center text-center hover:bg-teal-100 hover:shadow-lg transition-all transform hover:-translate-y-1">
                    <div class="bg-teal-600 p-3 rounded-lg mb-4 text-white">
                        <i data-lucide="circle-dot" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 class="font-bold text-slate-900">Lambung</h3>
                </div>

                <!-- Kandung Empedu -->
                <div onclick="openOrgan('Kandung Empedu', 'Membantu proses pencernaan lemak dan menjaga kesehatan fungsi empedu agar terhindar dari pengendapan kristal.')" class="cursor-pointer bg-teal-50 p-6 rounded-xl border border-teal-100 flex flex-col items-center text-center hover:bg-teal-100 hover:shadow-lg transition-all transform hover:-translate-y-1">
                    <div class="bg-teal-600 p-3 rounded-lg mb-4 text-white">
                        <i data-lucide="droplet" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 class="font-bold text-slate-900">Kandung Empedu</h3>
                </div>

                <!-- Kandung Kencing -->
                <div onclick="openOrgan('Kandung Kencing', 'Melancarkan sistem kemih, mengatasi masalah buang air kecil, serta meredakan nyeri pinggang bawah.')" class="cursor-pointer bg-teal-50 p-6 rounded-xl border border-teal-100 flex flex-col items-center text-center hover:bg-teal-100 hover:shadow-lg transition-all transform hover:-translate-y-1">
                    <div class="bg-teal-600 p-3 rounded-lg mb-4 text-white">
                        <i data-lucide="bath" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 class="font-bold text-slate-900">Kandung Kencing</h3>
                </div>

                <!-- Ginjal -->
                <div onclick="openOrgan('Ginjal', 'Meningkatkan vitalitas tubuh, menjaga keseimbangan hormon, serta memperkuat fungsi tulang dan sumsum.')" class="cursor-pointer bg-teal-50 p-6 rounded-xl border border-teal-100 flex flex-col items-center text-center hover:bg-teal-100 hover:shadow-lg transition-all transform hover:-translate-y-1">
                    <div class="bg-teal-600 p-3 rounded-lg mb-4 text-white">
                        <i data-lucide="database" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h3 class="font-bold text-slate-900">Ginjal</h3>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

            <!-- HARGA DAN FOOTER (Sama seperti sebelumnya) -->
    <section class="py-10 bg-white">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
            <div class="max-w-3xl mx-auto bg-slate-50 rounded-3xl shadow-md border border-slate-200 overflow-hidden">
                <div class="bg-teal-700 px-6 py-5 text-center">
                    <h4 class="text-2xl font-bold text-white">Daftar Harga Jasa & Layanan</h4>
                </div>
                <div class="p-8 text-center">
                    <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-slate-900">HARGA MULAI DARI 150.000</h2>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <section class="py-16 bg-teal-900 text-white">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
            <div class="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-8 text-center divide-y md:divide-y-0 md:divide-x divide-teal-800">
                <div class="py-6 md:py-0 px-4">
                    <div class="bg-teal-800 w-16 h-16 mx-auto rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
                        <i data-lucide="leaf" class="w-8 h-8 text-teal-300"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h5 class="text-xl font-bold mb-2">Terapis Tersertifikasi</h5>
                    <p class="text-teal-100/80">Ditangani langsung oleh ahli terapi yang telah lulus pelatihan standar nasional.</p>
                </div>
                <div class="py-6 md:py-0 px-4">
                    <div class="bg-teal-800 w-16 h-16 mx-auto rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
                        <i data-lucide="heart-pulse" class="w-8 h-8 text-teal-300"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h5 class="text-xl font-bold mb-2">Peralatan Steril</h5>
                    <p class="text-teal-100/80">Jarum akupuntur sekali pakai dan sterilisasi ketat pada alat bekam.</p>
                </div>
                <div class="py-6 md:py-0 px-4">
                    <div class="bg-teal-800 w-16 h-16 mx-auto rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
                        <i data-lucide="activity" class="w-8 h-8 text-teal-300"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h5 class="text-xl font-bold mb-2">Diagnosa Holistik</h5>
                    <p class="text-teal-100/80">Pemeriksaan nadi, lidah, dan keluhan secara komprehensif sebelum tindakan terapi.</p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <section id="kontak" class="py-20 bg-slate-50">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
            <div class="bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden">
                <div class="grid lg:grid-cols-2">
                    <div class="bg-teal-50 p-10 lg:p-12 border-b lg:border-b-0 lg:border-r border-teal-100">
                        <h3 class="text-3xl font-extrabold text-slate-900 mb-6">Hubungi Kami</h3>
                        <p class="text-slate-600 mb-10">
                            Konsultasikan keluhan kesehatan Anda dan atur jadwal terapi sekarang juga. Kami siap membantu Anda mencapai kesehatan optimal.
                        </p>
                        
                        <div class="space-y-6">
                            <div class="flex items-start gap-4">
                                <div class="bg-white p-3 rounded-full shadow-sm text-teal-600">
                                    <i data-lucide="map-pin" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <h4 class="font-bold text-slate-900">Alamat Pangobatan</h4>
                                    <p class="text-slate-600 mt-1">Lobam Bestari, Jl. Utama 4 Blok A4 No.23, Seri Kuala Lobam.</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <div class="flex items-start gap-4">
                                <div class="bg-white p-3 rounded-full shadow-sm text-teal-600">
                                    <i data-lucide="phone" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <h4 class="font-bold text-slate-900">Telepon / WhatsApp</h4>
                                    <p class="text-slate-600 mt-1">085147999900</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="flex items-start gap-4">
                                <div class="bg-white p-3 rounded-full shadow-sm text-teal-600">
                                    <i data-lucide="mail" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <h4 class="font-bold text-slate-900">Email</h4>
                                    <p class="text-slate-600 mt-1">erikusmanto74@gmail.com</p>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="flex items-start gap-4">
                                <div class="bg-white p-3 rounded-full shadow-sm text-teal-600">
                                    <i data-lucide="clock" class="w-6 h-6"></i>
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <h4 class="font-bold text-slate-900">Jam Operasional</h4>
                                    <p class="text-slate-600 mt-1">
                                        Senin - Sabtu: 08.00 - 20.00 WIB<br />
                                        Minggu: 09.00 - 15.00 WIB
                                    </p>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div id="reservasi" class="p-10 lg:p-12">
                        <h3 class="text-2xl font-bold text-slate-900 mb-6">Buat Janji Temu</h3>
                        <form class="space-y-5" onsubmit="event.preventDefault(); alert('Terima kasih! Permintaan jadwal Anda telah diterima.');">
                            <div>
                                <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-1">Nama Lengkap</label>
                                <input 
                                    type="text" 
                                    required
                                    class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-teal-500 focus:border-teal-500 outline-none transition-all"
                                    placeholder="Masukkan nama Anda"
                                />
                            </div>
                            <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-5">
                                <div>
                                    <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-1">No. WhatsApp</label>
                                    <input 
                                        type="tel" 
                                        required
                                        class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-teal-500 focus:border-teal-500 outline-none transition-all"
                                        placeholder="08xx..."
                                    />
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-1">Layanan</label>
                                    <select required class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-teal-500 focus:border-teal-500 outline-none transition-all bg-white">
                                        <option value="">Pilih Terapi</option>
                                        <option value="akupunktur">Akupunktur</option>
                                        <option value="bekam_basah">Bekam Basah</option>
                                        <option value="bekam_kering">Bekam Kering</option>
                                        <option value="hipnoterapi">Hipnoterapi</option>
                                        <option value="totok_wajah">Totok Wajah</option>
                                        <option value="totok_perut">Totok Perut</option>
                                        <option value="refleksi">Refleksi</option>
                                        <option value="fisioterapi">Fisioterapi</option>
                                        <option value="pijat_bayi">Pijat Bayi</option>
                                        <option value="pengobatan">Pengobatan</option>
                                    </select>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div>
                                <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-1">Keluhan / Catatan</label>
                                <textarea 
                                    rows="3"
                                    class="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-teal-500 focus:border-teal-500 outline-none transition-all resize-none"
                                    placeholder="Ceritakan keluhan kesehatan Anda..."
                                ></textarea>
                            </div>
                            <button 
                                type="submit"
                                class="w-full bg-teal-600 text-white font-bold text-lg py-3.5 rounded-xl hover:bg-teal-700 transition-colors shadow-lg hover:shadow-teal-600/30"
                            >
                                Kirim Permintaan Jadwal
                            </button>
                            <p class="text-xs text-slate-500 text-center mt-3">
                                Tim kami akan menghubungi Anda via WhatsApp untuk konfirmasi jadwal.
                            </p>
                        </form>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <footer class="bg-slate-900 text-slate-300 py-12 border-t border-slate-800">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
            <div class="grid md:grid-cols-4 gap-8">
                <div class="col-span-1 md:col-span-2">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2 mb-4">
                        <i data-lucide="leaf" class="w-6 h-6 text-teal-500"></i>
                        <span class="font-bold text-xl text-white">PIJAT TRADISIONAL (Akupresur, Acupoint, Anatomi)</span>
                    </div>
                    <p class="text-sm text-slate-400 max-w-sm leading-relaxed">
                        Pusat terapi bekam dan akupunktur terpercaya. Berkomitmen pada kesehatan masyarakat dengan metode pengobatan holistik yang aman dan steril.
                    </p>
                </div>
                
                <div>
                    <h4 class="text-white font-bold mb-4">Tautan Cepat</h4>
                    <ul class="space-y-2 text-sm">
                        <li><a href="#beranda" class="hover:text-teal-400 transition-colors">Beranda</a></li>
                        <li><a href="#tentang" class="hover:text-teal-400 transition-colors">Tentang Klinik</a></li>
                        <li><a href="#layanan" class="hover:text-teal-400 transition-colors">Daftar Layanan</a></li>
                        <li><a href="#kontak" class="hover:text-teal-400 transition-colors">Hubungi Kami</a></li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
                
                <div>
                    <h4 class="text-white font-bold mb-4">Layanan</h4>
                    <ul class="space-y-2 text-sm">
                        <li>Terapi Bekam Basah</li>
                        <li>Terapi Bekam Kering</li>
                        <li>Akupuntur Nyeri</li>
                        <li>Akupuntur Estetika</li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="border-t border-slate-800 mt-10 pt-8 flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-center gap-4 text-sm text-slate-500">
                <p>&copy; <span id="current-year"></span> PIJAT TRADISIONAL. Hak Cipta Dilindungi.</p>
                <div class="flex gap-4">
                      <a href="https://www.facebook.com/eri.kusmanto.1" target="_blank" class="hover:text-white cursor-pointer">Facebook</a>
                      <a href="https://www.instagram.com/eri.kusmanto.1" target="_blank" class="hover:text-white cursor-pointer">Instagram</a>
                      <a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@pak.eri.bintan" target="_blank" class="hover:text-white cursor-pointer">TikTok</a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </footer>

    <script>
        // Modal Logic
        const modal = document.getElementById('organModal');
        const modalTitle = document.getElementById('modalTitle');
        const modalContent = document.getElementById('modalContent');

        function openOrgan(title, desc) {
            modalTitle.innerText = title;
            modalContent.innerHTML = `<p>${desc}</p><div class="mt-4 p-3 bg-teal-50 rounded-lg text-teal-800 text-sm font-medium border-l-4 border-teal-600">Konsultasikan keluhan ini melalui WhatsApp 085147999900 untuk penanganan yang tepat.</div>`;
            modal.classList.remove('hidden');
            document.body.classList.add('modal-active');
        }

        function closeModal() {
            modal.classList.add('hidden');
            document.body.classList.remove('modal-active');
        }

        // Close on click outside
        window.onclick = function(e) { if (e.target == modal) closeModal(); }

        // Initialize Lucide Icons
        lucide.createIcons();

        // Menu Toggle
        const menuBtn = document.getElementById('menu-btn');
        const mobileMenu = document.getElementById('mobile-menu');
        menuBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            mobileMenu.classList.toggle('hidden');
            document.getElementById('icon-menu').classList.toggle('hidden');
            document.getElementById('icon-close').classList.toggle('hidden');
        });

        document.getElementById('current-year').textContent = new Date().getFullYear();
    </script>
<!-- WHATSAPP FLOATING BUTTON -->
<a href="https://wa.me/6285147999900?text=Halo%20Admin%2C%20saya%20ingin%20konsultasi%20mengenai%20layanan%20pijat." 
   target="_blank" 
   class="fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-[99] flex items-center justify-center w-16 h-16 bg-green-500 text-white rounded-full shadow-2xl hover:bg-green-600 hover:scale-110 transition-all duration-300 group">
    <!-- Icon WhatsApp (Lucide Icon) -->
    <i data-lucide="message-circle" class="w-8 h-8"></i>
    
    <!-- Tooltip -->
    <span class="absolute right-20 bg-white text-slate-800 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold shadow-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-300 whitespace-nowrap pointer-events-none">
        Chat via WhatsApp
    </span>
</a>
</body>
</html>
